render_rules: MEASURED cards render values with verdicts; null cards render 'not measured' with the reason, greyed, in place — the grid shape never changes. Staleness is shown, never hidden.

hero.method: worst verdict among measured sub-scores only; the denominator is shown ('N of 6 measured') — the ring never silently fills in for missing data

runtime.label: MEASURED

hermetic_ci_gate.label: Hermetic CI green across all repos

runtime.method: verdict = the heartbeat run's own GREEN/YELLOW/RED, emitted verbatim; activation and the hermetic-CI launch gate shown with denominators; CI test COUNTS are not publicly instrumented and stay null
runtime.verify: the live status page renders the same heartbeat tile — counts match this card

continuity.label: MEASURED
continuity.method: chain_intact = the publisher's fail-closed Ed25519+ML-DSA-65 chain replay passed (a bundle that fails is never published); verdict GREEN when ≥1 receipt is on the verified chain, YELLOW at 0
continuity.verify: re-verify the chain yourself: the published bundle at /proof/receipts-bundle.json, in-browser or offline

session.reason: session-economics checker not available on build machine

cost.label: MEASURED
cost.method: verdict GREEN when zero deterministic units reached a flagship model, YELLOW otherwise; billing instrumentation is gated so no dollar figure exists anywhere in this artifact
cost.verify: the live status page's routing tile — histogram recomputable from the counts shown

ownership.label: MEASURED
ownership.method: verdict GREEN when a verified chain with ≥1 receipt is published as a portable bundle a third party can verify offline, YELLOW otherwise
ownership.verify: download the bundle and run the offline verifier — the verification layer needs no vendor in the loop

agent_readiness.label: MEASURED

hermetic_ci_gate.label: Hermetic CI green across all repos

agent_readiness.method: verdict GREEN when every component is PRODUCTION and the hermetic-CI gate is done; YELLOW when CI is done and more than half are PRODUCTION; RED otherwise — non-PRODUCTION components are counted, never hidden
agent_readiness.verify: the live status page's activation matrix lists every component with its honest state

not_measured_registry.reason: billing instrumentation gated — ESTIMATED figures exist internally and are never published
single-run ESTIMATED — replication needed before it can render as measured
test totals are not publicly instrumented; only the hermetic-CI gate's done state is published
